## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (tsc strict + vite)
- [ ] `cd src-tauri && cargo build --lib` passes
- [ ] Tested with at least one provider end-to-end (which one? _____)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] No new dependencies (or new deps are justified in the description above)
- [ ] No secrets, no API keys, no personal paths in the diff
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
